news.title:
Manappuram Finance approved Rs.7,400 Cr borrowing plan for FY 2026-27, including NCDs.
It will invest Rs.7,905 Cr in Asirvad Micro Finance and Rs.150 Cr in Home Finance.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance approved Rs.7,400 Cr borrowing plan for FY 2026-27, including NCDs.
It will invest Rs.7,905 Cr in Asirvad Micro Finance and Rs.150 Cr in Home Finance.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance approved allotment of 9.29 cr equity shares at INR 236 each, raising INR 2192.5 cr via preferential issue.
Additionally, 9.29 cr warrants were issued to BC Asia Investments XIV, with 25% of INR 2192.5 cr paid upfront.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance approved allotment of 9.29 cr equity shares at INR 236 each, raising INR 2192.5 cr via preferential issue.
Additionally, 9.29 cr warrants were issued to BC Asia Investments XIV, with 25% of INR 2192.5 cr paid upfront.

news.title:
Bain Capital's open offer for Manappuram Finance begins April 6, ending April 20.
The offer aims to acquire 26% stake at ₹236 per share.
news.summary:
Bain Capital's open offer for Manappuram Finance begins April 6, ending April 20.
The offer aims to acquire 26% stake at ₹236 per share.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance to review its FY27 borrowing plan on March 30.
The review indicates updates in funding strategy and capital planning.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance to review its FY27 borrowing plan on March 30.
The review indicates updates in funding strategy and capital planning.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices fell 22% and 45% from peaks, impacting stocks like PC Jeweller, Kalyan Jewellers, Muthoot Finance, and Manappuram Finance.
Jewellery retailers like Titan may benefit from higher demand, while gold financiers and silver-linked firms like Vedanta face short-term challenges.

news.title:
Bain Capital's stake in Manappuram Finance may prompt RBI's evolving focus on NBFC ownership concentration.
RBI's conditional approval hints at stricter scrutiny on PE firms' overlapping exposures across NBFCs.
news.summary:
Bain Capital's stake in Manappuram Finance may prompt RBI's evolving focus on NBFC ownership concentration.
RBI's conditional approval hints at stricter scrutiny on PE firms' overlapping exposures across NBFCs.

news.title:
Manappuram, Muthoot Finance, and CSB Bank shares fell up to 5% due to gold price drops.
Gold corrected 11% last week, its steepest drop since 1983, falling 15% in a month.
news.summary:
Manappuram, Muthoot Finance, and CSB Bank shares fell up to 5% due to gold price drops.
Gold corrected 11% last week, its steepest drop since 1983, falling 15% in a month.

news.title: Manappuram and Muthoot Finance shares face pressure amid global gold price decline.
news.summary: Manappuram and Muthoot Finance shares face pressure amid global gold price decline.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley rates Manappuram Finance 'Equal Weight' with a target price of ₹315.
RBI nod for Bain Capital deal and revised open offer could boost stock price near-term.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley rates Manappuram Finance 'Equal Weight' with a target price of ₹315.
RBI nod for Bain Capital deal and revised open offer could boost stock price near-term.

news.title: RBI approves change in control and management for Manappuram Finance subsidiaries.
news.summary: RBI approves change in control and management for Manappuram Finance subsidiaries.

news.title:
RBI approves Bain Capital's joint control acquisition in Manappuram Finance for ₹4,385 crore.
Bain to hold 18.4%, promoters 28.9%; board to include Bain reps, SEBI open offer to follow.
news.summary:
RBI approves Bain Capital's joint control acquisition in Manappuram Finance for ₹4,385 crore.
Bain to hold 18.4%, promoters 28.9%; board to include Bain reps, SEBI open offer to follow.

news.title:
RBI fined Manappuram Finance ₹2.7 lakh for breaching KMP pay guidelines.
The lender failed to defer part of variable pay, violating RBI norms.
news.summary:
RBI fined Manappuram Finance ₹2.7 lakh for breaching KMP pay guidelines.
The lender failed to defer part of variable pay, violating RBI norms.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance Ltd confirms full redemption of 7,500 CPs worth ₹375 Cr on maturity date 02.03.2026.
Outstanding amount post redemption is NIL; last interest payment made on 02.03.2026.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance Ltd confirms full redemption of 7,500 CPs worth ₹375 Cr on maturity date 02.03.2026.
Outstanding amount post redemption is NIL; last interest payment made on 02.03.2026.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance completed NSE block trade for 1,743,707 shares at Rs.287.
Total transaction value of the block trade amounts to Rs.50.04 crores.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance completed NSE block trade for 1,743,707 shares at Rs.287.
Total transaction value of the block trade amounts to Rs.50.04 crores.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance's CEO to take medical leave from Feb 25, 2026.
Leave duration is 90-120 days for overseas treatment; disclosure per listing rules.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance's CEO to take medical leave from Feb 25, 2026.
Leave duration is 90-120 days for overseas treatment; disclosure per listing rules.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance shares to be in focus as RBI approves Bain Capital's acquisition of up to 41.7% stake.
Bain Capital to invest ₹4,385 crore, becoming a promoter, with shares priced at ₹236 in the deal.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance shares to be in focus as RBI approves Bain Capital's acquisition of up to 41.7% stake.
Bain Capital to invest ₹4,385 crore, becoming a promoter, with shares priced at ₹236 in the deal.

news.title:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.
news.summary:
Nifty fights to maintain 25,000 after shedding 200 points, nearing 26,000 last week.
IT sector drags Nifty; focus on Manappuram, Religare, EaseMyTrip, Fortis, GMR Airport.

news.title:
RBI approved 41.66% stake acquisition by two investors in Manappuram Finance.
Approval includes waiver of public notice; further RBI approvals pending for related entities.
news.summary:
RBI approved 41.66% stake acquisition by two investors in Manappuram Finance.
Approval includes waiver of public notice; further RBI approvals pending for related entities.

news.title:
Manappuram Finance confirms full redemption of 6,000 CPs worth Rs. 300 crore on 13.02.2026.
All details, including outstanding amount (Rs. NIL) and last interest payment date, were provided.
news.summary:
Manappuram Finance confirms full redemption of 6,000 CPs worth Rs. 300 crore on 13.02.2026.
All details, including outstanding amount (Rs. NIL) and last interest payment date, were provided.

news.title:
Gold and silver prices rebound; gold at $4,600/oz, silver at $78/oz.
MCX and Manappuram stocks rise nearly 6% from their recent lows.
news.summary:
Gold and silver prices rebound; gold at $4,600/oz, silver at $78/oz.
MCX and Manappuram stocks rise nearly 6% from their recent lows.
